name: dashboard-grid
title: Dashboard Grid
description: Responsive 12-column grid (DashboardGrid + DashboardGridItem) that stacks on mobile and resolves named column spans at the lg breakpoint — the layout substrate for blocks.

props.name: DashboardGridItem.span
props.description: Column width at lg (of 12). Below lg items stack / go 2-up.

clinicalNotes: Driven by CONTAINER queries, not the viewport: spans resolve against the grid's own width, so a block reflows correctly whether it's full-page, in a split pane, or in a narrow preview — never squeezing a 12-column layout into a small box. Dashboards run on wide workstations and bedside tablets alike, so the grid stacks to a single column when its container is narrow. Named spans (rather than raw column counts) keep block layouts readable; place the highest-priority panel (patient summary, active alerts) first so it leads at every size.
notes: Layer-M0 scaffolding. Static Tailwind container-variant span classes (no dynamic names) so the compiler always emits them. Arranges M2 panels inside M3 blocks.
